ck_role_assignments_scope_presence.name: ck_role_assignments_scope_presence
ck_role_assignments_scope_presence.value:
(
        ("iam"."tenant_role_assignments"."scope_type" = 'tenant' and "iam"."tenant_role_assignments"."scope_id" is null)
        or
        ("iam"."tenant_role_assignments"."scope_type" in ('legal_entity','business_unit','location') and "iam"."tenant_role_assignments"."scope_id" is not null)
      )

ck_items_ownership_scope.name: ck_items_ownership_scope
ck_items_ownership_scope.value:
(
        ("mdm"."items"."ownership_level" = 'tenant' and "mdm"."items"."legal_entity_id" is null and "mdm"."items"."business_unit_id" is null and "mdm"."items"."location_id" is null)
        or
        ("mdm"."items"."ownership_level" = 'legal_entity' and "mdm"."items"."legal_entity_id" is not null and "mdm"."items"."business_unit_id" is null and "mdm"."items"."location_id" is null)
        or
        ("mdm"."items"."ownership_level" = 'business_unit' and "mdm"."items"."legal_entity_id" is not null and "mdm"."items"."business_unit_id" is not null and "mdm"."items"."location_id" is null)
        or
        ("mdm"."items"."ownership_level" = 'location' and "mdm"."items"."legal_entity_id" is not null and "mdm"."items"."location_id" is not null)
      )

ck_org_units_scope_shape.name: ck_org_units_scope_shape
ck_org_units_scope_shape.value:
(
        ("mdm"."org_units"."location_id" is null or "mdm"."org_units"."legal_entity_id" is not null)
        and
        ("mdm"."org_units"."business_unit_id" is null or "mdm"."org_units"."legal_entity_id" is not null)
      )

ck_parties_ownership_scope.name: ck_parties_ownership_scope
ck_parties_ownership_scope.value:
(
        ("mdm"."parties"."ownership_level" = 'tenant' and "mdm"."parties"."legal_entity_id" is null and "mdm"."parties"."business_unit_id" is null and "mdm"."parties"."location_id" is null)
        or
        ("mdm"."parties"."ownership_level" = 'legal_entity' and "mdm"."parties"."legal_entity_id" is not null and "mdm"."parties"."business_unit_id" is null and "mdm"."parties"."location_id" is null)
        or
        ("mdm"."parties"."ownership_level" = 'business_unit' and "mdm"."parties"."legal_entity_id" is not null and "mdm"."parties"."business_unit_id" is not null and "mdm"."parties"."location_id" is null)
        or
        ("mdm"."parties"."ownership_level" = 'location' and "mdm"."parties"."legal_entity_id" is not null and "mdm"."parties"."location_id" is not null)
      )

ck_tax_registrations_owner_shape.name: ck_tax_registrations_owner_shape
ck_tax_registrations_owner_shape.value:
(
        ("mdm"."tax_registrations"."legal_entity_id" is not null and "mdm"."tax_registrations"."party_id" is null)
        or
        ("mdm"."tax_registrations"."legal_entity_id" is null and "mdm"."tax_registrations"."party_id" is not null)
      )

ck_tenants_deactivation_date.name: ck_tenants_deactivation_date
ck_tenants_deactivation_date.value: "mdm"."tenants"."deactivation_date" is null or "mdm"."tenants"."activation_date" is null or "mdm"."tenants"."deactivation_date" >= "mdm"."tenants"."activation_date"

mdm.v_current_tenant_policies.definition: select "id", "tenant_id", "policy_domain", "policy_key", "data_type", "policy_value", "effective_from", "effective_to", "status", "metadata", "is_deleted", "created_at", "updated_at", "version_no" from "mdm"."tenant_policies" where ("mdm"."tenant_policies"."is_deleted" = false and "mdm"."tenant_policies"."status" = 'active' and ("mdm"."tenant_policies"."effective_from" <= current_date and ("mdm"."tenant_policies"."effective_to" is null or "mdm"."tenant_policies"."effective_to" >= current_date)))
mdm.v_current_tenant_policies.name: v_current_tenant_policies

mdm.v_golden_items.definition: select "id", "tenant_id", "item_code", "item_name", "item_type", "base_uom_code", "category_id", "ownership_level", "legal_entity_id", "business_unit_id", "location_id", "valuation_method", "status", "mdm_status", "source_system_id", "aliases", "external_ref", "effective_from", "effective_to", "metadata", "is_deleted", "created_at", "updated_at", "version_no", "created_by", "updated_by" from "mdm"."items" where ("mdm"."items"."is_deleted" = false and "mdm"."items"."status" = 'active' and "mdm"."items"."mdm_status" = 'golden' and ("mdm"."items"."effective_from" <= current_date and ("mdm"."items"."effective_to" is null or "mdm"."items"."effective_to" >= current_date)))
mdm.v_golden_items.name: v_golden_items

mdm.v_golden_parties.definition: select "id", "tenant_id", "party_code", "party_type", "display_name", "canonical_name", "canonical_name_normalized", "ownership_level", "legal_entity_id", "business_unit_id", "location_id", "status", "mdm_status", "source_system_id", "golden_record_id", "aliases", "external_ref", "effective_from", "effective_to", "metadata", "is_deleted", "created_at", "updated_at", "version_no", "created_by", "updated_by" from "mdm"."parties" where ("mdm"."parties"."is_deleted" = false and "mdm"."parties"."status" = 'active' and "mdm"."parties"."mdm_status" = 'golden' and ("mdm"."parties"."effective_from" <= current_date and ("mdm"."parties"."effective_to" is null or "mdm"."parties"."effective_to" >= current_date)))
mdm.v_golden_parties.name: v_golden_parties
